content.question: Does church takeover of village schools genuinely prevent closure of the school building/staff, or does it merely formalize the transition of an already-declining institution, and what proportion of church takeovers occur in villages where closure was imminent versus preventive?
content.reduction_path: Conduct matched case comparison of church-takeover schools versus closed schools in villages of similar size/depopulation trajectory; interview KLIK officials and church administrators on timing and rationale for takeover decisions.
